lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

Prepare to be impressed by this absolute showstopper! This car is in flawless, mint condition, appearing exactly as it did on the showroom floor. Every detail has been meticulously preserved, from the pristine interior to the sparkling exterior. It drives perfectly and offers a truly like-new experience for its next lucky owner!

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently maintained over the years. The engine runs strong and the transmission provides smooth shifts, ensuring a reliable driving experience. Inside, the cabin is clean with only minor signs of wear, and all electronic features are fully functional. The exterior is well-preserved, though it does have a few light surface scratches and a small door ding consistent with regular use. Overall, this is a solid, dependable car that is ready for its next owner without needing immediate repairs.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is, ideally for parts or as a dedicated project car for a mechanic. The exterior exhibits significant wear, including extensive rust on the wheel wells and rocker panels, several large dents on the rear quarter panels, and severely faded paint across the hood and roof. Inside, the cabin shows its age with multiple tears in the upholstery, a cracked dashboard, and non-functional electronics, including the radio and climate control system. Mechanically, the engine starts but runs roughly, producing a visible exhaust smoke, and the transmission hesitates significantly when shifting. Potential buyers should be aware that the car has multiple fluid leaks and will likely require a tow from the lot. It is recommended only for those prepared for a full mechanical and cosmetic overhaul.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior and interior show moderate wear and some visible blemishes. Mechanical components are functional, though some parts may require maintenance or repair in the near future.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has noticeable scratches and several small dents. The interior shows moderate wear on the upholstery and carpet. All mechanical components are currently functional.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, preserved in impeccable showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and displaying no signs of wear, this unit represents the pinnacle of its class. For the discerning buyer seeking mechanical precision and aesthetic perfection, this offering is unparalleled in the current market.

Hey there! I'm honestly so sad to let this absolute beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in incredible shape—it looks and drives just like it did the day it left the showroom! I’ve truly babied this ride, keeping it spotless and perfectly maintained inside and out. If you’re looking for a car that’s basically flawless and ready for your next big road trip, you’ve found it! Come see it for yourself, you’re going to love it!

Offered is a concourse-grade E46 M3, showcasing absolute mechanical integrity. The S54 inline-six maintains factory-spec compression across all cylinders, delivering linear power through its 8,000 RPM redline via a crisp 6-speed manual
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. Fully operational. Inspection ready.

Presenting a truly exceptional example that defines 'showroom condition.' This vehicle has been meticulously preserved by a single owner and kept in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior paint is flawless, free of any stone chips or swirls, and retains its deep, original luster. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine state; the premium leather is supple with no signs of wear, and every technological feature functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive service history performed exclusively at certified dealerships. With remarkably low mileage and a clean title, this car offers a 'new-car' experience for the most discerning collector or enthusiast. It is, quite simply, the finest example of its kind available on the market today.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom-standard condition, exhibiting an impeccable exterior finish and a pristine interior cabin that reflects meticulous care. Engineering integrity is absolute, offering a driving experience that mirrors its original factory delivery. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly distinguished asset.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, this vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom-grade condition. Meticulously preserved and maintained to the highest standards, it offers a rare opportunity for the discerning collector who demands perfection. Every component reflects a commitment to preservation, ensuring an experience indistinguishable from its original delivery. We invite serious inquiries for this investment-grade acquisition.

Hey there! I’m finally parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. Honestly, this car is in such incredible shape, it still feels like it just rolled off the lot! I’ve babied it since day one—always garaged and kept spotless. It drives like a dream and looks even better in person. If you're looking for something that’s basically brand new without the sticker shock, this is the one! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and an 8,000 RPM redline. Mated to a precise Getrag 420G 6-speed manual gearbox, the drivetrain delivers power through a factory M-Variable limited-slip differential. This example is mechanically flawless, with documented preventative maintenance including a VANOS system overhaul, rod bearing replacement, and structural subframe reinforcement. The suspension geometry is factory-perfect, ensuring the telepathic steering response these chassis are known for. A truly turn-key, collector-quality specimen for the serious driving enthusiast.
Mint condition. Flawless exterior. Immaculate interior. Mechanically perfect. Full service history included.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that stands in pristine, showroom condition. This collector-grade car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, showcasing factory-perfect paint with a deep, mirror-like finish and zero imperfections. The interior is indistinguishable from new, featuring supple, unmarked leather and that distinct 'new car' aroma. Every mechanical component has been serviced ahead of schedule, with a comprehensive folder of maintenance records included. From the flawless alloy wheels to the untouched engine bay, every detail reflects a life of pampered ownership. This is, without question, the finest example available on the market today—offering a like-new driving experience for the discerning enthusiast who settles for nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, preserved in impeccable showroom condition. This unit represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector, having been maintained to the most exacting standards of automotive excellence. Every surface and mechanical component reflects a level of care that borders on the fastidious, ensuring an ownership experience indistinguishable from a new delivery. For those who demand an investment-grade specimen that transcends the typical pre-owned market, this vehicle stands as a definitive benchmark of quality and prestige.

Presented for your consideration is an exemplary specimen in pristine condition. This vehicle has been meticulously maintained to the highest professional standards, offering a showroom-quality aesthetic and peerless mechanical integrity. An investment-grade acquisition for the discerning driver who demands uncompromising quality and distinction.

Hey there! I’m so excited to find a new home for this absolute beauty! 🚗 It’s been my pride and joy and is in truly stunning condition—honestly, it looks and drives just like it did on day one. I’ve babied this car from the start, so it’s pristine inside and out. You’ve gotta see it to believe how perfect it is! Send me a message if you want to come check it out!

Offered is an investment-grade 1994 Mazda RX-7 (FD), preserved in a state that defies its vintage. This specimen features the sequential twin-turbocharged 13B-REW rotary engine, meticulously maintained to ensure the integrity of the apex seals and vacuum system. The chassis retains its factory-engineered 50/50 weight distribution, supported by a pristine four-wheel double-wishbone suspension and a Torsen limited-slip differential. Every mechanical component, from the synchronized five-speed manual transmission to the four-piston braking calipers, operates with surgical precision. The exterior retains its original high-gloss finish, while the interior remains free of the typical UV-induced delamination found in lesser examples. This is a purist’s vehicle, showcasing peak 90s JDM engineering without compromise.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full maintenance records available. Inspection welcome.

Experience automotive perfection with this showroom-quality specimen. Meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, protected by a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in pristine condition; the premium leather seats show no signs of bolster wear, and every electronic feature functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the vehicle is superlative, backed by a comprehensive service history and a recent multi-point inspection. With exceptionally low mileage and a clean title in hand, this car offers a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to own a truly flawless machine. No scratches, no dents, no excuses.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in pristine showroom condition. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a vehicle of unparalleled caliber and meticulous provenance.

We are pleased to present an exceptional vehicle that represents the pinnacle of its class. This specimen has been maintained to an exacting standard, presenting in showroom condition both mechanically and aesthetically. With a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new, this vehicle caters to the most discerning automotive enthusiast. Every component has been meticulously inspected and verified to ensure it meets our rigorous criteria for excellence, offering an uncompromising driving experience.

Hey there! Are you ready for your dream ride? I’m parting with my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, she is in stunning, flawless shape! It’s basically like driving off the lot for the first time. Everything is super clean, runs like a dream, and has been babied since day one. You won't find another one this perfect—come check it out and see for yourself!

This 2004 BMW M3 (E46) is a preserved example of high-revving naturally aspirated engineering. At its heart lies the S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and double VANOS variable valve timing, delivering a linear power band up to its 8,000 RPM redline. Power is managed via a Getrag 420G 6-speed manual gearbox and sent to the rear wheels through an M Variable Differential Lock. This specimen boasts a structurally sound chassis with documented subframe reinforcement and proactive rod bearing service. The suspension retains its factory-spec kinematics, providing the precise turn-in and lateral stability synonymous with the M-division's peak output. Every mechanical component, from the dual-mass flywheel to the cross-drilled rotors, operates with the tactile feedback expected of a showroom-grade performance machine.
Pristine condition. Garage kept. Full service records included. No mechanical issues. Interior and exterior are flawless.

Experience automotive perfection with this showroom-quality masterpiece. This vehicle has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled garage, showcasing a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish and absolutely no chips or scratches. The interior is equally immaculate, featuring supple, untouched leather and that signature new-car scent. Every component, from the advanced infotainment system to the high-performance engine, functions with precision. With a complete history of proactive maintenance performed exclusively by master technicians, this car offers a driving experience indistinguishable from new. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a truly pristine vehicle.

We are pleased to present an exceptional vehicle that redefines the standard for pre-owned luxury. This specimen is in pristine, showroom condition, reflecting a history of meticulous maintenance and climate-controlled storage. With its flawless exterior and an interior that retains its original factory luster, this vehicle represents an uncompromising choice for the discerning collector. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, mirroring its aesthetic perfection. This is a rare opportunity to acquire an investment-grade automotive masterpiece.
